mapper.sql: id, material_code, supplier_code, stock_code, material_name, usage_text, category, color, responsible_person, min_sheet_size, max_sheet_size, min_spacing, design_info, applicable_interface, notes, is_active, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM silicone_coarse_uv_product ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM silicone_coarse_uv_product WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT FROM silicone_coarse_uv_product WHERE material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR usage_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR notes LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE silicone_coarse_uv_product SET material_code = #{materialCode}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, stock_code = #{stockCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, usage_text = #{usageText}, category = #{category}, color = #{color}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, min_sheet_size = #{minSheetSize}, max_sheet_size = #{maxSheetSize}, min_spacing = #{minSpacing}, design_info = #{designInfo}, applicable_interface = #{applicableInterface}, notes = #{notes}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.sql: c.id, c.product_id, c.post_processing_step, c.compatibility_status, c.display_order, c.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT , p.material_name AS product_name FROM silicone_coarse_uv_compatibility c LEFT JOIN silicone_coarse_uv_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY c.display_order ASC, c.post_processing_step ASC
SELECT , p.material_name AS product_name FROM silicone_coarse_uv_compatibility c LEFT JOIN silicone_coarse_uv_product p ON c.product_id = p.id ORDER BY c.product_id ASC, c.display_order ASC
SELECT , p.material_name AS product_name FROM silicone_coarse_uv_compatibility c LEFT JOIN silicone_coarse_uv_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO silicone_coarse_uv_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES (#{productId}, #{postProcessingStep}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{displayOrder})

INSERT INTO silicone_coarse_uv_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES
(#{item.productId}, #{item.postProcessingStep}, #{item.compatibilityStatus}, #{item.displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT post_processing_step FROM silicone_coarse_uv_compatibility ORDER BY post_processing_step ASC
SELECT material_name FROM silicone_coarse_uv_product WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY material_name ASC
